title: MD
biography: Moses Maimonides was a Sephardic Jewish philosopher-physician who served as court physician to Saladin and wrote influential medical texts on asthma, poisons, and diet. His medical works combined Greek medicine with his own clinical observations.
aiSummary: Maimonides is a medicine specialist at Fatimid Court. Based in Cairo.

timeline.title: Treatise on Asthma
timeline.description: Wrote one of the earliest comprehensive works on asthma treatment and prevention

timeline.title: Court Physician to Saladin
timeline.description: Served as personal physician to the Sultan of Egypt
